title: Waystar (formerly ZirMed) - Claims and Revenue Cycle Management
problem: Healthcare providers need comprehensive claims management, denial prevention, and patient payment solutions.
solution: Claims management, eligibility verification, denial prevention, patient payments, and analytics. AI-powered platform for revenue cycle optimization.
traction_signals: Merged ZirMed and Navicure to form Waystar
varden_fit: HIGH — ZirMed was a pioneer in cloud-based RCM. The merged Waystar entity is the leader.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Cloud-based RCM is now standard. European healthcare needs similar cloud-first approaches.
